items: For multi-turn document generation apps, maintain session state storing both the semantic outline and generated file paths to enable iterative refinement.
Split FastAPI sub-apps into config/models/prompts/service/main modules when logic exceeds 150 lines or crosses distinct concern boundaries.
Separate LLM content generation (outlines) from document rendering (python-pptx) to allow text-level modifications before final file generation.
Provide downloadable FileResponse endpoints for generated assets, with storage paths isolated per session.
Support iterative refinement workflows where users pivot from initial generation ('create PPT about X') to specific adjustments ('change theme to dark', 'add slide about Y').
Implement theme/configuration systems that constrain visual choices while allowing runtime customization via chat commands.
When extending chat apps to support file uploads, audit existing utilities first—dedicated file parsers (Excel/PDF/Word) are often already implemented but not wired to the API.
Integrate file uploads into existing text flows by extracting content via utility modules and prepending it to the user prompt, maintaining backward compatibility with text-only inputs.
Normalize multi-modal inputs into unified text content at the API entry point to avoid refactoring downstream business logic and LLM prompt templates.
